name: looped-meet
description: Open-source, self-hostable meeting rooms with first-class AI agent participants

scripts.dev: docker compose -f docker-compose.yaml -f docker-compose.build.yaml -f docker-compose.debug.yaml up -d --build livekit agent-bridge demo-agent && (docker compose -f docker-compose.yaml -f docker-compose.build.yaml -f docker-compose.debug.yaml stop web >/dev/null 2>&1 || true) && infisical run --projectId=396f8208-593a-4966-8943-97621affc25a --env=dev --path=/apps/web --path=/shared -- pnpm --filter @meet/web dev
scripts.dev:stack: docker compose -f docker-compose.yaml -f docker-compose.build.yaml -f docker-compose.debug.yaml up --build
scripts.dev:up: docker compose -f docker-compose.yaml -f docker-compose.build.yaml -f docker-compose.debug.yaml up -d --build && echo "\n  ➜ http://localhost:3000  (management password: dev)\n"
scripts.dev:logs: docker compose -f docker-compose.yaml -f docker-compose.build.yaml -f docker-compose.debug.yaml logs -f agent-bridge web
scripts.dev:down: docker compose -f docker-compose.yaml -f docker-compose.build.yaml -f docker-compose.debug.yaml down
